versions.version_description: My words are the correct words that MG sings and all the in between chords are added in. It's complete.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: Who Will The Next Fool Be

content:
INTRO: 
[ch]G[/ch]  -  [ch]Em[/ch]  -   [ch]C[/ch]  -   [ch]D[/ch]  -    [ch]G[/ch]  

VERSE ONE  
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
When the night has come[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Em[/ch]
....And the land is dark [/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
And the  moon is the only light we'll see [/tab]

VERSE TWO
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
No, I won't be afraid,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch] 
...No, I won't be afraid [/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch] 
Just as long, as you stand , stand by me.[/tab]
 
CHORUS
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
So,darling, darling, ..stand by me, [/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
...Oh! stand,..by me  [/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
Oh, stand now....stand by me...stand by me [/tab]

VERSE THREE
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
If the sky that we look upon[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch] 
...Should tumble and fall [/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]                [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]
And the mountains should crumble to the sea, [/tab]


VERSE FOUR
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
I won't cry, I won't cry,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch] 
...No, I won't shed a tear [/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]
Just as long, .as you stand..stand by me.[/tab]

CHORUS
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
And, darling, darling, .stand by me, [/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
...Oh! stand,..by me  [/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
Oh, stand now.....stand by me....stand by me [/tab]


INSTRUMENTAL:  PLAY TWO VERSES

CHORUS
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
And, darling, darling, ..stand by me, [/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
...Oh! stand,..by me  [/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
Oh, stand now.....stand by me...stand by me[/tab]

CHORUS TWO 
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
When ever your in trouble won’t you....stand by me   [/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
...Oh, Stand...by me [/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
oh stand .....stand by me ..stand by me......fade  [/tab]
